entries.en-US: # Using fonts in Remotion
entries.zh-Hans: # 在 Remotion 中使用字体

entries.en-US: ## Google Fonts with @remotion/google-fonts
entries.zh-Hans: ## 通过 @remotion/google-fonts 使用 Google Fonts

entries.en-US: The recommended way to use Google Fonts. It's type-safe and automatically blocks rendering until the font is ready.
entries.zh-Hans: 这是使用 Google Fonts 的推荐方式。它是类型安全的，并会自动阻止渲染，直到字体准备就绪。

entries.en-US: ### Prerequisites
entries.zh-Hans: ### 前提条件

entries.en-US:
First, the @remotion/google-fonts package needs to be installed.
If it is not installed, use the following command:
entries.zh-Hans:
首先，需要安装 @remotion/google-fonts 包。
如果尚未安装，请使用以下命令：

entries.en-US:
```bash
npx remotion add @remotion/google-fonts # If project uses npm
bunx remotion add @remotion/google-fonts # If project uses bun
yarn remotion add @remotion/google-fonts # If project uses yarn
pnpm exec remotion add @remotion/google-fonts # If project uses pnpm
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```bash
npx remotion add @remotion/google-fonts # If project uses npm
bunx remotion add @remotion/google-fonts # If project uses bun
yarn remotion add @remotion/google-fonts # If project uses yarn
pnpm exec remotion add @remotion/google-fonts # If project uses pnpm
```

entries.en-US: Preferrably, specify only needed weights and subsets to reduce file size:
entries.zh-Hans: 为了减小文件大小，最好只指定所需的字重和子集：

entries.en-US: ### Waiting for font to load
entries.zh-Hans: ### 等待字体加载

entries.en-US: Use `waitUntilDone()` if you need to know when the font is ready:
entries.zh-Hans: 如果需要知道字体何时准备就绪，请使用 `waitUntilDone()`：

entries.en-US: ## Local fonts with @remotion/fonts
entries.zh-Hans: ## 通过 @remotion/fonts 使用本地字体

entries.en-US: For local font files, use the `@remotion/fonts` package.
entries.zh-Hans: 对于本地字体文件，请使用 `@remotion/fonts` 包。

entries.en-US: ### Prerequisites
entries.zh-Hans: ### 前提条件

entries.en-US: First, install @remotion/fonts:
entries.zh-Hans: 首先，安装 @remotion/fonts：

entries.en-US:
```bash
npx remotion add @remotion/fonts # If project uses npm
bunx remotion add @remotion/fonts # If project uses bun
yarn remotion add @remotion/fonts # If project uses yarn
pnpm exec remotion add @remotion/fonts # If project uses pnpm
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```bash
npx remotion add @remotion/fonts # If project uses npm
bunx remotion add @remotion/fonts # If project uses bun
yarn remotion add @remotion/fonts # If project uses yarn
pnpm exec remotion add @remotion/fonts # If project uses pnpm
```

entries.en-US: ### Loading a local font
entries.zh-Hans: ### 加载本地字体

entries.en-US: Place your font file in the `public/` folder and use `loadFont()`:
entries.zh-Hans: 将你的字体文件放在 `public/` 文件夹中，并使用 `loadFont()`：

entries.en-US: ### Loading multiple weights
entries.zh-Hans: ### 加载多个字重

entries.en-US: Load each weight separately with the same family name:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用相同的字体系列名称分别加载每个字重：

entries.en-US: ### Available options
entries.zh-Hans: ### 可用选项

entries.en-US: ## Using in components
entries.zh-Hans: ## 在组件中使用

entries.en-US: Call `loadFont()` at the top level of your component or in a separate file that's imported early:
entries.zh-Hans: 在你的组件顶层或在一个提前导入的单独文件中调用 `loadFont()`：
